entities.name: Signum Domini
entities.raw_quote: Signum Domini, CXV.2, CXXIX.4, CXXXIII.46, CXXXVII.22.

entities.name: Seal of God

attributes.use: effective against physical dangers and protection from ghosts or phantasms

entities.raw_quote: Many variants of this Seal of God occur... effective against a long list of physical dangers, as well as protection from ghosts or phantasms.

entities.name: Magic Circle

attributes.purpose: basis for invoking spirits; providing the 'greatest fortification' against spirits
attributes.structure: seven-fold classification including planets, directions, winds, elements, and humors

entities.raw_quote: A representation of this “map of the universe” is the basis for the magic circle used for invoking spirits.

entities.name: The Sun
entities.raw_quote: East, warm and moist, where the angels of the Sun dominate.

entities.name: Jupiter
entities.raw_quote: Consol (Southeast) hot, mixed moist dry [NOT DRY]... Jupiter Uriel Zebedey

entities.name: Mars
entities.raw_quote: South hot and dry Fire Very hot & dry, masculine Mars Karathiel Eloy

entities.name: Venus
entities.raw_quote: Nogahel (Southwest) warm, and feminine Air Warm & moist... Venus Uriel Ienomei

entities.name: The Moon
entities.raw_quote: West cold and moist / feminine Water Cold & moist, feminine The Moon Hocroel Theos

entities.name: Mercury
entities.raw_quote: Frigicap (Northwest) cold and damp, masculine... Mercury Vihel Sother

entities.name: Saturn
entities.raw_quote: Northern part cold and dry Earth Very cold & dry, masculine Saturn Lanael Christ

entities.name: Shem ha-Meforash

attributes.composition: derived from the initial letters of seventy-two names of God

entities.raw_quote: The text also uses the Hebrew term Shem ha-Melorash, probably meaning something like “explicit name” of God.

entities.name: Asmodeus
entities.raw_quote: Asmodeus (CXXXV.10) is of course well known from Tobit...

entities.name: Bileth
entities.raw_quote: Bileth is another name well-known in the literature.

entities.name: Candle of virgin wax
entities.raw_quote: Candle of virgin wax. It should be noted that wax was more expensive than tallow candles, but provided a much cleaner flame.

entities.name: Incense mixture
entities.raw_quote: The Seal of God consecration specifies a mixture of amber, musk, aloe, white and red labdanum, mastic, frankincense, pearls, and “incense”

entities.name: Swords

attributes.requirement: equal in length, lustrous or brightly polished
attributes.restriction: not used when calling higher angels

entities.raw_quote: Seven are needed when calling forth spirits, but not the higher angels. The swords should all be equal in length...

entities.name: Wand of laurel or hazel

attributes.specification: four sides on which are written figures and sacred names; hazel rod should be length of master's arm

entities.raw_quote: Wand of laurel or hazel... the hazel rod/switch (virga avellane) should be the length of the master’s arm, extended

entities.name: Whistle
entities.raw_quote: Whistle: It is sounded and struck at various points in the ritual to call the spirits. It is not used with the higher angels.

summary: This chunk details the cosmological structure of the Honorius magic system, including a seven-fold universe of planets, elements, and directions. It provides specific lists of divine names (Shem ha-Meforash), hierarchies of angels and demons, and an extensive inventory of ritual tools, ingredients, and preparatory requirements for the practitioner.
key_passages: The magic circle is required for calling spirits, and is described as providing the “greatest fortification” against the spirits.
The use of the names of God is central to the method of Honorius...
The seventy-two letter name of God... is derived from the initial letters of seventy-two names of God.
The preparations taught by Honorius... include a special diet, shaving the hair from your body, sexual abstinence, confession and contrition...
Seven [swords] are needed when calling forth spirits, but not the higher angels.
